name: Splash
description: Товар в окружении динамических эффектов: вода, пар, пыль, искры — в зависимости от категории. Freeze-motion.
prompt_prefix: Freeze-motion product photography. Product surrounded by dynamic environmental effects matching its category. Water splashes for kitchen/bath products, fine steam or mist for beauty, subtle sparks for electronics, dust particles for sports gear. Dynamic but premium. High-speed photography feel. Ultra realistic. 8K. Dark background for contrast.
composition: Product center, action effects frozen around it, plenty of negative space
lighting: Dramatic backlight to illuminate splashes/particles, key light on product
